misc: Waters the course more than the course sprinklers.
biography: Pekka, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, brings a unique blend of competitive spirit and jovial camaraderie to the greens. Representing Espoo Ringside Golf, Pekka is known for his meticulous approach to the game and an even more meticulous approach to course hydration; rumor has it he waters the course more than the sprinklers!

With seven past appearances, Pekka's experience is undeniable, and his single victory at the Hector Trophée demonstrates his capability to perform under pressure. While the Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, Pekka's determination suggests he remains a strong contender in individual play.

As he prepares for his eighth appearance at Hector Trophée 2026, Pekka's enthusiasm and dedication to the sport continue to make him a respected and admired figure among fellow competitors and spectators alike.
